channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google to change map names to Gulf of America and Mt. McKinley based on Trump order
item.description: The Associated Press, which provides news around the world to multiple audiences, will refer to the Gulf of Mexico by its original name, which it has carried for 400 years, while acknowledging the name Gulf of America.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Don't panic! Baldur's Gate 3 players on PS5 who were affected by the accidental release of Patch 8 can fix their game using this easy solution
item.description: Baldur's Gate 3 Patch 8 was accidentally dropped early for PS5 players, but thankfully there's a way to rescue your save file.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hackers Using "Hidden Text Salting" to Bypass Email Security Measures
item.description: Security researchers warn about 'hidden text salting' in emails, where hackers hide parts of the text to confuse email scanners and land phishing messages in people's inboxes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Git Credential Helper Vulnerabilities: Update Now to Avoid Credential Leakage - Security News
item.description: Git credential helper vulnerabilities have been found, allowing malicious actors to leak login credentials from projects. Patches are available, and users are urged to update now.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek live – all the latest news about the ChatGPT rival, as privacy concerns emerge
item.description: DeepSeek is the new AI model that's on everybody's lips –here's all the latest news on the ChatGPT competitor.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Trump: DeepSeek 'wake-up call' for US tech giants
item.description: President Trump said Monday that DeepSeek, a Chinese startup behind a popular new artificial intelligence (AI) model, represented a “wake-up call” for American tech firms.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google wants to give IT admins more control over what Chrome extensions you use at work
item.description: Google has finally launched its Enterprise Chrome Web Store, and we already know which features are coming next.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Endor Labs’ new tool helps enterprises track the AI models they use
item.description: Software supply chain security vendor Endor Labs has added another dimension to its products with Tuesday’s launch of AI Model Discovery, which will be part of its core open-source evaluation offering.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Philips' new OLED TVs offer next-gen panels with your choice of extra image quality or better built-in sound, and I like this direction
item.description: LG's new Primary RGB Tandem panels, combined with hardcore image processing and Bowers & Wilkins sound options.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Scalpers are salivating right now - MSI suggests RTX 5090 supply will be tight due to Nvidia's shortage
item.description: It isn't much of a surprise, but the RTX 5090 is expected to have a short supply according to Nvidia's partner, MSI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: IT predictions: 5 things that won’t change in 2025
item.description: Every January futurists opine on what will be different. Just as important, but typically underappreciated, are trends that will perpetuate themselves deep into the year to come. Here’s a look at what I see staying the same for IT leaders in 2025.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps
item.description: The report highlights the possibility of unauthorized access and control over critical systems. The post After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Indian media houses rally against OpenAI over copyright dispute
item.description: The legal heat on OpenAI in India intensified as digital news outlets owned by billionaires Gautam Adani and Mukesh Ambani joined an ongoing lawsuit against the ChatGPT creator.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Las empresas españolas concentrarán mayoritariamente su inversión en IA este 2025
item.description: Así es cómo los responsables de la toma de decisiones TI de todo el mundo evalúan el progreso de sus estrategias basadas en inteligencia artificial (IA) en 2024, el retorno de la inversión y el impacto que esta tecnología tendrá en sus planes futuros.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Meta to invest up to $65B in AI infrastructure, develop an ‘AI engineer’ agent
item.description: Not to be outdone by its close rival OpenAI, Meta has announced its plans to spend $60 to $65 billion on AI infrastructure this year, and is building a data center almost as big as Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DOJ indicts North Korean conspirators for remote IT work scheme
item.description: The US Department of Justice this week announced that it had indicted two North Korean nationals and three other men, accusing them of participating in a conspiracy designed to trick US companies into funding the North Korean regime.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump’s move to lift Biden-era AI rules sparks debate over fast-tracked advances
item.description: President Donald Trump’s executive order removing Biden-Administration rules governing AI development is being cast as an opening of AI development flood gates, which could fast track advances in the still-new technology, but could also pose risks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world
item.description: "We're focused on geosynchronous Earth orbit, where the most valuable real estate in space," said Bernie Kelm. The post The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: AMD’s unpatched chip microcode glitch may require extreme measures by CISOs
item.description: Due to a partner disclosure, AMD has found itself in the unenviable position of having to confirm the existence of a major cybersecurity problem in its chip microcode before it could post a fix. But that headache is mild compared to those of their customers’ CISOs.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Screen breaks and the right desk setup offer relief from work-related eye strain
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The trouble started every day at around 3 p.m., after Cathy Higgins had spent five or six hours staring at an array of computer screens at her desk. Her university job overseeing research projects involved peering closely at numbers and details on contracts, applications and budgets.
item.dc:creator: CATHY BUSSEWITZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump administration shuts down White House Spanish-language page and social media
item.description: Within hours of President Donald Trump’s inauguration, the new administration took down the Spanish-language version of the official White House website. The site — currently https://www.whitehouse.gov/es/ — now gives users an “Error 404” message.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 5 best home inventory apps to protect your property in case of emergency
item.description: Home inventory and restoration apps help itemize and track every item in your home in the event you have to make an insurance claim after a natural disaster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI experiment in halfpipe judging at X Games will give snowboarders a glimpse into the future
item.description: The X Games will experiment judging halfpipe runs this week in Aspen using artificial intelligence, the cutting-edge technology that could someday play a role in the way subjectively judged sports are scored.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 10 tech upgrades to save your time, privacy and money this year
item.description: Today's tech can help make life so much easier — if you know how to use it. Here are a few tips on the quickest and best ways to make your phone, laptop and other devices work for you.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
